title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement MOA, in Behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños, with the Girl Scouts of the Philippines (GSP) for the Use of the Facilities of the Latter Located at Barangay Timugan, Los Baños, Laguna As Isolation Units or Quarantine Areas As Part of the Lgus Prevention and Mitigation Measures to Address the Threats Posed Against the Public by the Emerging Infectious Disease Known As Corona Viruz Di
